headline.text: L1 Sollich 2 heating elements broken — operator heating caramel drain pipe *with a torch* since 06:14, no fix yet.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 Sollich 3 ran normally through the shift. Sollich 2 has broken heating elements on the caramel drain pipe — operator is using a torch as a workaround since 06:14, still unresolved at window close.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 FFS line ran cleanly. ML2 flow wrap belt failed at 06:44 — maintenance began replacement work by 06:49 but not yet back online. Lot 10140 was received without COAs; team reached out to supplier at 06:53.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 ML4 cleared a cooler humidity alarm in 7 minutes at start-up, then paused at 06:51 waiting for TG techs. MF Matrix started on time but flagged weight problems at 06:50. Truffle Line reported sticking issues on the center row at 06:29.

notes.text: Scheduling conflict flagged — S2 and S3 both scheduled to run jars on June 11th, requesting change.

resolved.title: ML4 cooler cabinet 4 humidity alarm blocked depositing
resolved.summary: High humidity alarm on cooler cabinet 4 prevented depositing start at 05:39; cleared and depositing resumed by 05:46.

needs_attention.title: Sollich 2 caramel drain pipe heating elements broken
needs_attention.summary: Heating elements that warm the caramel drain pipe are broken; operator is using a torch to heat the pipe as a workaround.
needs_attention.status: Heating elements broken since 06:14, operator using torch workaround, no repair timeline.

needs_attention.title: ML2 flow wrap belt failure
needs_attention.summary: Line started running at 06:44 but flow wrap belt failed and needs replacement; maintenance began getting replacement belt by 06:49.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance getting replacement belt as of 06:49, no confirmation of install or line restart.

needs_attention.title: Lot 10140 delivered without COAs
needs_attention.summary: Material lot 10140 offloaded and received at 06:53 but supplier delivered without certificates of analysis; team reached out to supplier contacts for COAs.
needs_attention.status: Material received, reached out to William R. and Diego R. for COAs from supplier as of 06:53, awaiting response.

needs_attention.title: Truffle Line sticking issues on center row
needs_attention.summary: Operator reported sticking problems on the center row at 06:29; adjustments were made but issue persists.
needs_attention.status: Sticking on center row flagged at 06:29, adjustments made but issue still present.

needs_attention.title: MF Matrix weight problems
needs_attention.summary: Line started on time at 06:44 but experiencing weight control issues flagged at 06:50.
needs_attention.status: Weight problems reported at 06:50, no update on resolution or root cause.

needs_attention.title: ML4 paused waiting for TG techs
needs_attention.summary: Product reached demolding at 06:51 and line paused to wait for TG techs to arrive.
needs_attention.status: Line paused at demolding as of 06:51, waiting for TG techs.
